description:
YARG is an Open-Source plastic band rhythm game! 
Play through the YARG Official Setlist for the crowd,
and maybe get some free items from your fans!

26.02.21.description:
New apworld featuring the Rock Band 3 setllist.

New apworld combining the Guitar Hero 1, Rock Band 3, and YARG setlists.

Updates to the Guitar Hero 1 apworld are mostly backend changes to maintain compatibility going forward.

A tutorial for ripping songs or verifying existing rips has been provided in the Github readme.

If you previously had rips that worked with the version 1 of the Guitar Hero 1 apworld, they may no longer be compatible. However, they are relatively easy to fix. Refer to the guide on metadata in the Github readme.
26.02.21.title: Rock Band 3 version 1, Guitar Hero 1 version 1.1, All Setlists version 1

26.02.21.1.description: Fix an issue in YARGGuitarHero1.apworld that caused generation to fail.
26.02.21.1.title: Guitar Hero 1 ver 1.11 Hotfix

26.03.29.description:
This release includes version 1.0 of the Guitar Hero World Tour apworld as well as some changes made to every other apworld in this branch.

There is now a provided .zip file containing all of the metadata you need to make your songs work. No more manually editing the text files. I have adjusted the metadata in all of the games I have setup thus far. Your existing metadata may not match the new version and you may need to update some of your songs. Refer to the readme file if you get confused. You will NOT need to create new rips.

# Guitar Hero World Tour Release

Includes the 86 songs found on the retail disc, with an option to enable the Guitar Battles. Toggle "GHWT Guitar Battles" in the "Enabled Setlists" option.

# Guitar Hero 1 version 1.2

Significant metadata changes were made to most of the setlist. You may need to download the metadata zip file. 

The "Guitar Hero 1 Hidden Songs" setlist has been renamed to "GH1 Hidden Songs"

# Rock Band 3 version 1.1

Only a couple songs had changes made to their metadata. You will likely be able to get by with just download the individual files directly from the repo.

"Oye Mi Amor" has been made optional due to some versions of the retail disc not ripping the song properly. It is now toggleable within the "Enabled Setlists" option as "RB3 Oye Mi Amor"

# All Setlists version 1.1

- Added YARN Request Pack 1
- Added Guitar Hero World Tour
- Added GHWT Guitar Battles
- Added the changes made in the other apworlds
26.03.29.title: Guitar Hero World Tour Release and Metadata Rework

26.04.02.description:
# Guitar Hero 1 version 1.3
- Implement Exclude Songs yaml option

# Guitar Hero World Tour version 1.1
- Implement Exclude Songs yaml option

# Rock Band 3 version 1.2
- Implement Exclude Songs yaml option

# YARG All Setlists version 1.2
- Add YARG Setlist 0
- Implement Exclude Songs yaml option
26.04.02.title: Implement YARG Setlist 0 and Exclude Songs Setting

26.04.04.description:
This release only contains a bugfix that only sometimes caused generation failures with the All Setlists apworld if 2 or more copies of the same song appeared in a seed. This can happen due to the same song appearing in multiple setlists.

This bugfix does not prevent duplicate songs from appearing in seeds but rather properly handles it.

Only the All Setlists world was changed. No other worlds were affected by this bug.
26.04.04.title: All Setlists version 1.21 Hotfix

26.04.09.description:
Only YARG All Setlists is updated. Version 1.3

 - Added Walter Ralts 01
26.04.09.title: YARG All Setlists - Add Walter Ralts 01
